nodes.name: hwL2VpnBgpVsiNumber
nodes.description: This object indicates the bgp vsi number have created.

nodes.name: hwVplsVcNumberUpperThreshold
nodes.description: This object indicates the vpls vc number is upper than threshold.

nodes.name: hwL2VpnWorkingMode
nodes.description: This object indicates the working mode of mpls L2vpn.

nodes.name: hwL2VpnVsiVcNumber
nodes.description: This object indicates the vsi vc number have created.

nodes.name: hwL2VpnEnable
nodes.description: This object indicates whether enabled mpls L2vpn capability or not.

nodes.name: hwL2VpnVsiNumber
nodes.description: This object indicates the vsi number have created.

nodes.name: hwVplsVcNumberMaxNum
nodes.description: This object indicates the max vpls vc number.

nodes.name: hwL2VpnLocalCCCNumber
nodes.description: This object indicates the local ccc number have created.

nodes.name: hwL2VpnVcLimitClass
nodes.description: This object indicates the class of l2vpn vc limit.

nodes.name: hwL2VpnSwitchVcNumber
nodes.description: This object indicates the number of MS-PWs already created.

nodes.name: hwL2vpnAcIfTable
nodes.description:
This table is the interface configuration table used by L2VPN. Users
                can read interface by it.

children.name: hwL2vpnAcIfEntry
children.description: Provides the information of a interface entry.

children.name: hwL2vpnAcIfCfgTtpHeader
children.description: Denotes the rtp-header option is enable or not

children.name: hwL2vpnAcIfEncapStep
children.description: Specifies the step of TDM frames.

children.name: MIB
children.description:
The HUAWEI-L2VPN-MIB contains objects to
                      manage global Attributes of L2VPN.

nodes.name: hwL2VpnBgpVcNumber
nodes.description: This object indicates the bgp vc number have created.

nodes.name: hwL2VpnLdpVcNumber
nodes.description: This object indicates the ldp vc number have created.

nodes.name: hwL2VpnSvcNumber
nodes.description: This object indicates the static vc number have created.

nodes.name: hwL2VpnRemoteCCCNumber
nodes.description: This object indicates the remote ccc number have created.
